steps.title: Supply pronoun and verb
steps.content: The blank refers back to the constitution of Australia, which is singular. The sentence also needs a verb to connect that subject to 102nd in a global ranking.

steps.title: Reject missing or wrong forms
steps.content: A is a plural possessive and supplies no verb. B is plural, so it disagrees with constitution. C is singular but possessive, and it still supplies no verb. The remaining contraction means it is, giving both the pronoun and verb. The answer is D.
